import json,urllib.request,base64
paths=['README_CN.md','pyproject.toml','gdpval_bench/README.md','openspace/__main__.py','openspace/tool_layer.py','openspace/dashboard_server.py','openspace/mcp_server.py','openspace/__init__.py']
for path in paths:
    url=f'https://api.github.com/repos/HKUDS/OpenSpace/contents/{path}'
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(url, timeout=30\) as r:
        data=json.load\(r\)
    content=base64.b64decode\(data['content']\) if data.get\('encoding'\)=='base64' else b''
    text=content.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    print\('\\n' + '='*20 + path + '='*20\)
    print\(text[:14000]\)
PY)

import json,urllib.request,base64
paths=['openspace/skill_engine/registry.py','openspace/skill_engine/skill_ranker.py','openspace/skill_engine/retrieve_tool.py','openspace/agents/grounding_agent.py','openspace/grounding/core/search_tools.py','openspace/grounding/core/quality/__init__.py']
for path in paths:

            data=json.load\(r\)

        print\('ERROR',e\)
        continue
    text=base64.b64decode\(data['content']\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    print\('\\n' + '='*20 + path + '='*20\)
    print\(text[:14000]\)
PY)
